name: Youvarlakia
method: Begin to make the meatballs for this Greek sausage soup.
In a large mixing bowl, combine all of the meatball components and
whisk until soft, squeezing the components with your arm.
Enable fifteen minutes for the combination to rest in the refrigerator.
2 1/2 cup water, brought to a boil in a big saucepan.
Reduce the heat to low and carefully drop the meatballs into the
Crack an egg into a bowl and stir to make the egg-lemon salsa for the
Greek meatball broth. Whisk in the lime juice thoroughly.
Pour a ladle of hot soup into the mixing bowl and whisk easily.
Add another ladle and swirl until all is well mixed.
Toss the youvarlakia soup with the egg cream sauce.
